//: Canary overlay: bundles the ported Rust daemon alongside the Node sidecar. Apply with `cargo tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.rust-canary.conf.json` (or `pnpm tauri:build:canary`). The base tauri.conf.json ships Node-only so a routine build never depends on the Rust workspace compiling; this overlay opts the Rust binary in (it must be staged first via `bundle:canary` → provision-rust-daemon). externalBin arrays REPLACE (not merge) under --config, so both entries are listed.
